routes.description: Connect WeConnect to the local Upochi Todo API.

manifest.description: Connect WeConnect to the local Upochi Todo API.

permissions.name: network:loopback
permissions.reason: Connect to the Upochi App API on this Mac to list, add, and remove Todos.

requirements.name: Upochi App
requirements.description: Download, install, and run Upochi 1.0.0. This unsigned Apple Silicon build must expose Local API v1 on the configured loopback URL.

requirements.name: macOS 13+ on Apple Silicon
requirements.description: The currently published Upochi App build supports macOS arm64 only.

routes.description: Create and edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files through a self-contained OfficeCLI route.

manifest.description: Create and edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files through a self-contained OfficeCLI route.

permissions.name: network
permissions.reason: Call the OpenAI-compatible LLM configured in WeConnect.

permissions.name: filesystem:read
permissions.reason: Read user-provided documents and assets inside the private Office route workspace.

permissions.name: filesystem:write
permissions.reason: Create and edit documents inside the private Office route workspace.

permissions.name: process:spawn
permissions.reason: Run the separately installed OfficeCLI binary with validated arguments and no shell.

requirements.name: OfficeCLI 1.x
requirements.description: Install the separate CLI with 'npm install -g @officecli/officecli', then verify 'officecli --version'. It is not bundled with this route.

requirements.name: WeConnect LLM
requirements.description: Configure and validate an OpenAI-compatible API key and model in WeConnect before using this route.
